title: MemoryConsolidatedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `memory_consolidated` event — records a merge/supersede/reject/accept outcome from consolidation. See spec/memory-delta-v1.md §5.5.

existing_node_id.description: UUID of the node being merged-into or superseded. `null` for "accept" and "reject".

new_node_id.description: UUID of the newly-formed node when one was created. `null` for "reject" and supersede-in-place.

reason.description: Free-text rationale from the consolidation decider. Consumers MUST NOT parse it semantically.
